query:
-- Indicadores de Fevereiro/2026
SELECT 
  'Negócios no mês (unidades)' as indicador,
  COUNT(*) as valor
FROM sales 
WHERE companyId = 'company_1766331506068'
  AND MONTH(createdAt) = 2 
  AND YEAR(createdAt) = 2026
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Comissão Vendida',
  COALESCE(SUM(totalCommission), 0)
FROM commissions 
WHERE companyId = 'company_1766331506068'
  AND MONTH(createdAt) = 2 
  AND YEAR(createdAt) = 2026
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Comissão Recebida (Paga)',
  COALESCE(SUM(totalCommission), 0)
FROM commissions 
WHERE companyId = 'company_1766331506068'
  AND status = 'paid'
  AND MONTH(createdAt) = 2 
  AND YEAR(createdAt) = 2026;
